name: python3-gitlab
title: python3-gitlab
description:
Python 3 GitLab API client library
Provides access to the GitLab v4 server API.
This package contains the Python 3 library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-gitlab because Python 3 GitLab API client library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-gitlab as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-gitlab with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-gitlab --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
